subjects.description: An oncoming vehicle in the opposite lane, identifiable mainly by its intensely bright high-beam headlights piercing through the darkness; the body of the car is obscured behind the glare, only faint hints of a dark sedan silhouette visible around the light source
subjects.appearance_details: Two blinding white-blue circular headlight pools with prominent lens-flare star artifacts, halation, and bloom radiating outward; faint amber side marker glow
subjects.relationship: The source of glare impairing the ego vehicle's visibility; travels directly opposite the ego on the shared mountain road
subjects.location: center to slightly left of frame, approaching from background to midground
subjects.relative_size: Small within frame growing to Medium within frame as it nears
subjects.orientation: Front-facing toward the camera, headlights aimed directly at the ego viewpoint
subjects.action: Approaching on the opposite lane with high beams on, then passing by
subjects.state_changes: Grows brighter and larger as it bursts from behind the rock buttress on the switchback, peaks in glare at closest approach, then sweeps past to the left and recedes down-valley, glare clearing

subjects.description: The ego vehicle itself, represented only by its interior dashboard edge and the forward illumination of its own headlights spilling onto the road ahead
subjects.appearance_details: Faint dashboard reflection along the bottom edge of the frame, twin cones of headlight light spreading over the asphalt and lane markings
subjects.relationship: The point-of-view vehicle through which the entire scene is observed
subjects.location: implied at camera position, dashboard at bottom foreground
subjects.orientation: Facing forward down the road in the driving direction
subjects.action: Driving the mountain road, rounding a left switchback, then continuing while slowing and resuming speed
subjects.state_changes: Decelerates significantly during peak glare, then accelerates back to nominal cruising speed

background_setting: An Alpine mountain road at night, a dry two-lane winding along a forested slope with no central divider, partly cloudy sky letting scattered moonlight silver the peaks. Autumn foliage crowds the uphill bank while the downhill side drops away past a low guardrail into black valley. Worn lane markings hug the curves. The road bends sharply left around a rock buttress ahead, the switchback briefly hiding then revealing the oncoming lane. Beyond the guardrail the valley is deep darkness dotted with a few distant village lights.

lighting.conditions: Partly cloudy mountain night with scattered moonlight; no street lighting, headlights only, dry roadway
lighting.direction: Ego headlights front-lit into the bend; intense oncoming high-beam glare emerging from around the left switchback
lighting.shadows: Sharp swinging shadows from foliage and rock as headlights sweep the curve, black void down-valley
lighting.illumination_effect: Headlight cones sweeping rock and autumn leaves against valley black; oncoming high beams burst around the buttress with overwhelming bloom, sharp starburst flares, and washout

aesthetics.composition: Road curving left around a rock buttress near mid-frame with valley black to the right, oncoming glare bursting from the bend upper-center, dashboard edge at bottom
aesthetics.color_scheme: Moon-silvered peaks and black valley with warm autumn foliage in the light cones, cut by harsh white-blue headlight glare
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Tense, precarious, disorienting, momentarily blinding, very cautious on the curve
aesthetics.patterns: Guardrail posts and switchback curves sweeping past

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward dashcam tracking around the mountain switchback, lateral swing into the left bend, deceleration drift then re-acceleration
cinematography.framing: Wide shot of the road ahead from driver viewpoint
cinematography.focus: Road and guardrail ahead, though glare overwhelms focus at peak brightness

context: Demonstration of nighttime oncoming-headlight glare and driver visibility management on a mountain road

actions.description: Ego vehicle drives the mountain road at nominal speed, distant oncoming headlights appear faint around a left switchback
Vehicle rounds the switchback; oncoming high beams rapidly intensify, bursting from the bend with glare and lens artifacts
Ego vehicle slows significantly to manage impaired visibility as the oncoming car passes on the left
Glare clears, mountain road becomes visible again, ego vehicle resumes nominal speed

segments.description: Driving the mountain road at steady speed with faint oncoming light growing around a left switchback
segments.key_changes: Distant headlights begin to appear past the rock buttress
segments.camera: Forward tracking with a gentle swing into the bend

segments.description: Rounding the switchback as oncoming high beams burst into severe glare
segments.key_changes: Rapid increase in brightness, bloom and sharp starburst artifacts wash across the frame
segments.camera: Lateral swing through the bend, then straightening onto the road ahead

segments.description: Ego vehicle slows for the passing car on the curve, then glare clears and nominal speed resumes
segments.key_changes: Deceleration, oncoming vehicle sweeps past left, artifacts fade, mountain road regains visibility, re-acceleration
segments.camera: Slight forward dip during braking, then smooth resumed forward tracking

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the dashcam view shows an Alpine mountain road at night, ego headlights sweeping autumn foliage and guardrail while a faint glow appears around a left switchback. By 0:01 the vehicle enters the bend and a pair of oncoming high beams rapidly brightens, bursting from behind the rock buttress. Through 0:02-0:03 the view is overwhelmed by white-blue glare, sharp lens-flare starbursts, and bloom against the valley black. Around 0:03 the ego slows noticeably to cope with impaired visibility as the oncoming car sweeps past on the left. From 0:04 to 0:05 the glare clears, the mountain road reappears, and the ego accelerates back to nominal cruising speed.
audio_description: Steady low hum of the engine and tire noise on dry asphalt with a slight strain, rising then dipping as the vehicle decelerates. A faint whoosh of the oncoming vehicle passing close on the curve, mountain wind and deep valley silence; no music or speech.
